'''damoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycetismus|mycetismus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycetismus|mycetismus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| damoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmeteth|dæmeteth]] || [[word:dæmetej|dæmetej]] || [[word:dæmetesh|dæmetesh]] || [[word:dæmete|dæmete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:damomototh|damomototh]] || [[word:damomotoj|damomotoj]] || [[word:damomotosh|damomotosh]] || [[word:damomoto|damomoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:damototh|damototh]] || [[word:damotoj|damotoj]] || [[word:damotosh|damotosh]] || [[word:damoto|damoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:damoftofth|damoftofth]] || [[word:damoftofj|damoftofj]] || [[word:damoftofsh|damoftofsh]] || [[word:damoftof|damoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damototho|damototho]] || [[word:damotojo|damotojo]] || [[word:damotosho|damotosho]] || [[word:damotoko|damotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damototh|damototh]] || [[word:damotoj|damotoj]] || [[word:damotosh|damotosh]] || [[word:damoto|damoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damotothol|damotothol]] || [[word:damotojol|damotojol]] || [[word:damotoshol|damotoshol]] || [[word:damotokol|damotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damotoothotho|damotoothotho]] || [[word:damotoojojo|damotoojojo]] || [[word:damotooshosho|damotooshosho]] || [[word:damotooko|damotooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damotothon|damotothon]] || [[word:damotojon|damotojon]] || [[word:damotoshon|damotoshon]] || [[word:damotokon|damotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damotothooro|damotothooro]] || [[word:damotojooro|damotojooro]] || [[word:damotoshooro|damotoshooro]] || [[word:damotokooro|damotokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a345f0f}}
